name: Christmas Episode
description:
Description: Your entire friend group decided to come to your place for Christmas since A, they had nothing better to do and B, your the only one of them who could actually afford a proper two story house and not just some cramped apartment in a shady neighborhood.

Artist: Veyonis

Author Note: This is my first Veyonis art bot, EVER. Did I do good? How can I improve? Feel free to leave your feedback in the comments below.
creator: The Restricted One
